name: fill-gaps-v1-m1-sequelize-parity
description: Implement first-party Sequelize repositories, align schema artifacts to core contracts, and add adapter integration tests.

userStories.title: Implement Sequelize repositories for core contracts
userStories.description: As an app integrator, I want first-party Sequelize repositories so that Solidus can persist and query billing projections without custom infra code.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement concrete repositories in src/packages/sequelize covering customers, payment methods, charges, subscriptions, invoices, webhook deliveries, and idempotency records
Repositories satisfy src/packages/core/contracts.ts interfaces without any escapes
Registration path exposes a typed repository bundle for facade and webhook wiring
userStories.notes: Implemented concrete repositories and typed delegate-based bundle in src/packages/sequelize/repositories.ts and exported via src/packages/sequelize/index.ts. Added repository contract tests in src/packages/sequelize/__tests__/repository-adapters.test.ts. Verified gates: bun run typecheck, bun run lint, bun test src/packages/sequelize --test-name-pattern "repository" (9 pass, 0 fail).

userStories.title: Align Sequelize schema and migration templates
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want schema parity with contract records so that runtime writes are lossless and predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: Update packages/sequelize schema and migration templates to include required contract fields currently missing
Preserve migration naming and versioning conventions in packages/sequelize/migrations/templates
Update packages/sequelize/docs/schema.md and packages/sequelize/README.md to reflect final schema
userStories.notes: Aligned schema artifacts and migration templates with contract projection fields and webhook lifecycle requirements. Updated packages/sequelize/src/schema.ts, migration templates, docs, README, and schema artifact test coverage. Preserved template file naming/versioning. Verified gates: bun run typecheck, bun run lint, bun test packages/sequelize/test --test-name-pattern "schema" (3 pass, 0 fail).

userStories.title: Add adapter-level integration tests
userStories.description: As an integrator, I want repository contract tests so that adapter behavior remains stable over upgrades.
acceptanceCriteria: Add deterministic tests for CRUD, lookup, and idempotency conflict behavior across new repositories
Add tests for webhook persistence lifecycle including delivery, attempts, and dead-letter transitions
Ensure tests run in Bun and are scoped to sequelize adapter contracts
userStories.notes: Expanded adapter-level deterministic tests for CRUD/lookup/idempotency conflicts and webhook delivery/retry/dead-letter lifecycle in src/packages/sequelize/__tests__/repository-adapters.test.ts. Verified Bun-scoped adapter suite and gates: bun run typecheck, bun run lint, bun test src/packages/sequelize/__tests__ (10 pass, 0 fail).
